outcomes.rollFlavourText: Delinquency rates tick up; the book looks worse than it did last quarter.
Spreads hold. The portfolio treads water.
Origination volumes up; fee income covers the carry cost.
Record consumer credit demand — the book re-prices at a premium.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Double-hit on 1–3 in negative GMI years.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Once per year: one loan interest payment on this asset generates an additional income offset beyond its normal allowance. Synergizes with Tax Attorney's reclassification — shelter stacks are deeper when both are active.

Once per year: look at the top 2 cards of the market discard pile. You may pay $1 to acquire one immediately at its current value, or leave both in place. Tax Attorney's Distressed Acquisition targets the full discard pile at half base value — this previews the top 2 only, at market rate.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 14.

cardDescription: Generates $1 income per year with standard Finance volatility. Carries double-hit exposure on rolls 1–3 in negative GMI years, amplifying value loss when credit conditions deteriorate.
flavourText: Other people's debt is the purest form of income.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Bid-ask spreads blow out; the desk is offside on inventory.
Flow is thin and two-sided. The desk clears flat.
Volumes pick up; the desk captures spread on both legs.
Exceptional flow year — the desk printed on every major line.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Double-hit on 1–3 in negative GMI years.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: On any negative GMI year: this asset's income is treated as +1 higher before tax calculation. On double-hit years (1–3 rolled in a negative GMI year): +2 income instead. The double-hit value loss still applies to asset value — only income is boosted.
+1 loan cap after 2 consecutive years without a negative value roll.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 12.

cardDescription: Generates $1 income per year with standard Finance volatility. Subject to double-hit on rolls 1–3 in negative GMI years. Vertical integration with upstream Finance converts double-hit years into an income boost rather than a pure loss.
flavourText: We don't take sides. We take both.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: The arb closes against the position; the spread compressed in the wrong direction.
The trade sits in carry. No convergence, no loss.
Spreads converge as expected; the position unwinds at a gain.
Credit dislocation resolves cleanly — the fund captures the full arb premium.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Double-hit on 1–3 in negative GMI years. The Quant's inversion mechanic is eligible on this asset in any negative GMI year. This asset qualifies for the Quant's Pact Dividend roll each year it's held.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: The Quant's inversion mechanic is eligible on this asset in any negative GMI year. Non-Quant: +1 loan cap if GMI this year is negative (defensive spread positioning). This asset qualifies for the Quant's Pact Dividend roll each year it's held.

cardDescription: Zero income; pure capital appreciation play. Subject to double-hit on rolls 1–3 in negative GMI years. Eligible for the Quant's inversion mechanic and Pact Dividend roll, making it a high-value Warlock asset.
flavourText: The spread is the product. Everything else is theatre.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: The distressed book marks down further; no buyers at any price.
Workouts proceed slowly. Recovery trickles in.
Several positions resolve ahead of schedule — restructuring fees book.
A wave of forced sellers floods the market; the fund acquires at historic discounts.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Double-hit on 1–3 in negative GMI years.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Once per year: if any player triggers a forced sale this year, you may match the forced-sale price and acquire the asset before it returns to the market. Tax Attorney's Distressed Acquisition already acquires from the discard pile at half base value — this intercepts forced sales in real time, a different route to the same prey.
Treat repayment roll as one higher on this asset.

cardDescription: Generates $1 income with Tier 2 Finance volatility and high upside. Carries double-hit exposure on rolls 1–3 in negative GMI years; particularly dangerous in downturns as the distressed book itself can deteriorate rapidly.
flavourText: One man's margin call is another man's discount.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Portfolio companies miss EBITDA; lenders start asking questions.
Fund marks up modestly. No exits, but the carry clock ticks.
A secondary sale closes above NAV; deal flow accelerates.
Banner vintage — multiple exits at peak multiples, management fees fully realised.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Double-hit on 1–3 in negative GMI years.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Once per year during the auction phase: draw the top card from the market deck and add it to the current auction. You may bid on it immediately alongside all other players. Synergizes with Tax Attorney's MARKET PREVIEW — stacked with this effect, you set what enters the market and know it in advance.
+1 loan cap after 2 consecutive years without a negative value roll.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap for each MFG asset you own (max +2).

cardDescription: Generates $1 income with strong Tier 2 upside on high rolls. Subject to double-hit on rolls 1–3 in negative GMI years. Vertical integration with upstream Finance grants auction-phase market access — a deal-flow advantage.
flavourText: Leverage other people's companies, then leverage the leverage.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Correlation assumptions break down; the structured book re-marks at a loss.
Tranches hold. Spread income covers servicing costs.
New issuance demand drives structuring fee income above forecast.
Record CDO issuance year — every tranche oversubscribed, fees compounding on fees.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Double-hit on 1–3 in negative GMI years.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: The Quant's inversion mechanic on this asset also generates +1 cash in any year where the double-hit fires, before resolution. Non-Quant: +2 loan cap if GMI this year is negative.

cardDescription: Zero income; appreciation-only Tier 2 Finance asset. Subject to double-hit on rolls 1–3 in negative GMI years. Non-Quant players gain +2 loan capacity in negative GMI years via midstream integration — a defensive loan buffer in downturns.
flavourText: Structure is what you call complexity when you're selling it.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: A margin call cascade triggers counterparty exposure across the book — regulators are watching.
Advisory revenue holds but trading desks underperform. A flat year by the bank's standards.
Deal flow strong; M&A fees and underwriting commissions both beat consensus.
Record year across all divisions — the bonus pool is the largest in the firm's history.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Double-hit on 1–3 in negative GMI years.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Once per year during settlement: look at the top 3 personal event cards. Take 1 into your hand; return the other 2 in any order. This additional draw is separate from your normal annual draw. Tax Attorney's MARKET PREVIEW can extend this window to the top 5 cards.

Once per year: up to $2 of income this year may be counted as deferred rather than current — pay tax on it next year instead. Synergizes with Tax Attorney's reclassification (which removes income from tax entirely) — deferral is a weaker, non-CEO version of the same tool.

cardDescription: Generates $2 income per year with Tier 3 Finance volatility and maximum upside of +8. Carries a steep -4 delta on a roll of 1, subject to double-hit in negative GMI years — the largest single-turn loss exposure in the Finance industry.
flavourText: Too big to fail. Too connected to jail.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Sovereign mandates pull capital; the fund's reserve position deteriorates sharply.
Allocations hold steady. The fund posts marginal gains against its benchmark.
Cross-border capital flows favour the fund's position — carry income and NAV both appreciate.
A geopolitical reallocation drives massive inflows — the fund re-rates at a generational premium.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Double-hit on 1–3 in negative GMI years. Quant's inversion mechanic on this asset operates without the second value loss being applied — the double-hit fires but the second delta is negated. Non-Quant: in any neg GMI year, this asset's value update roll is treated as one higher.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Quant's inversion mechanic on this asset operates without the second value loss being applied — the double-hit fires but the second delta is negated. Non-Quant: in any neg GMI year, this asset's value update roll is treated as one higher.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +2 additional if value exceeds 30.

cardDescription: Zero income; pure capital growth with Tier 3 upside of +8. Subject to double-hit on rolls 1–3 in negative GMI years, but the Quant's inversion mechanic negates the second delta on this asset — making it uniquely resilient in Warlock hands.
